evidence: gh run list --branch fix/issue-325-security-deps: run 23849376199 (NodeJS Frontend Preview) = failure, run 23849376195 (Tests) = success, run 23849376256 (Docker) = success
gh run view 23849376199 --log-failed: ERR_NGROK_334 - endpoint 'shawana-unsympathised-botfly.ngrok-free.dev' is already online

5xWhy: Why1=ngrok fails | Why2=previous run's 5-min keep-alive still holds static endpoint | Why3=commit df2c58a triggered run 4 mins into first run's keep-alive | Why4=two commits pushed within 3 min each triggered a workflow | Why5=no concurrency group in workflow to cancel superseded runs
Root cause: no concurrency group in nodejs-frontend-preview.yml causes ERR_NGROK_334 when two workflow runs overlap on same ngrok static endpoint
Fix: add 'concurrency: group: preview-${{ github.ref }} cancel-in-progress: true' to nodejs-frontend-preview.yml
Verified: file now has 'concurrency: group: preview-${{ github.ref }} cancel-in-progress: true' before jobs section
